_comment._about: Config for the chess analysis MCP server. JSON has no real comments, so these '_comment' keys document each field. Claude Code ignores top-level keys it doesn't recognize, so this block is safe to keep.
_comment.command: 'uv' runs the server in an auto-managed environment: it downloads a compatible Python and installs the dependencies on first launch (from pyproject.toml), so this file is machine-independent and you should NOT need to edit the command. Install uv with the project's install script (see README 'Installation').
_comment.args: 'run --directory . python -m server.mcp_server' tells uv to use THIS project's environment and run the MCP server. Don't change this.

env.STOCKFISH_PATH: OPTIONAL. Path to the Stockfish binary. Leave it out and the server auto-detects a normal brew/apt install (or `stockfish` on your PATH). Only add an absolute path here if auto-detection fails.
env.CHESS_USERNAME: Your main Lichess/Chess.com username, so the tool can tell which side is 'you' in a game.
env.CHESS_ALIASES: OPTIONAL. Comma-separated list of any other handles you've played under, so old/alt accounts fold into one coaching profile.
env.LICHESS_TOKEN: OPTIONAL. Lets the fetch_games/fetch_game tools import your Lichess games so you don't paste PGNs. Leave empty for anonymous access (fine for most). If you import a lot and start hitting rate limits (HTTP 429), paste a free Personal Access Token from https://lichess.org/account/oauth/token (no scopes needed) here — requests are then throttled per-token instead of per-IP.
env.CHESS_PROFILE_RECENT: OPTIONAL. How many recent games feed the 'recent form' coaching profile.
env.CHESS_PROFILE_LIFETIME: OPTIONAL. How many games feed the broader 'lifetime' profile ('all' for everything).
env.CHESS_DATA_DIR: OPTIONAL. Where analyzed-game history + the analysis cache + settings live. You normally DON'T set this: by default it resolves to a per-user app-data folder (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Kibitz/data) that the double-click .app uses too, so games analyzed in Claude Code and in the app share one history/cache (no re-analysis, one coaching profile) automatically. Set an absolute path here only to force a custom location (e.g. <repo>/.chess-review to keep data inside this checkout); .mcp.json does NOT expand ~ or $HOME.

_comment._notice: -------------------- SET CHESS_USERNAME BELOW; everything else is optional --------------------
